title: encyclia ciliaris
intro: Encyclia ciliaris, also known as the Butterfly Orchid, is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Encyclia ciliaris include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Encyclia ciliaris is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
